Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type

Enum SupportedGenerationMethod

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<SupportedGenerationMethod>
      • com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<SupportedGenerationMethod>
    public enum SupportedGenerationMethod
extends Enum<SupportedGenerationMethod>
    Represents the supported generation methods for Gemini models, providing a standardized way to identify the different capabilities of each model. These methods correspond to specific actions or operations that a Gemini model can perform, such as generating text, embedding content, or counting tokens.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant Description
      COUNT_MESSAGE_TOKENS
      **Count Message Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given message, specifically designed for analyzing conversational text.
      COUNT_TEXT_TOKENS
      **Count Text Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given text, commonly used for text processing and analysis.
      COUNT_TOKENS
      **Count Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given text or content, providing insights into the length and complexity of the input.
      CREATE_CACHED_CONTENT
      **Create Cached Content:** Creates and stores cached content for a model, optimizing performance and reducing latency for frequently used inputs or responses.
      CREATE_TUNED_MODEL
      **Create Tuned Model:** Creates a custom-tuned model for a specific task, going beyond text generation to encompass various model capabilities.
      CREATE_TUNED_TEXT_MODEL
      **Create Tuned Text Model:** Creates a custom-tuned text model based on a specific dataset and task, allowing for more specialized and accurate text generation.
      EMBED_CONTENT
      **Embed Content:** Embeds content, which may include text, images, or other modalities, into a vector representation, facilitating multimodal understanding and processing.
      EMBED_TEXT
      **Embed Text:** Embeds text into a vector representation, capturing its semantic meaning and enabling similarity comparisons and other vector-based operations.
      GENERATE_ANSWER
      **Generate Answer:** Generates a grounded answer to a question, leveraging external knowledge sources or provided context to provide more informative and accurate responses.
      GENERATE_CONTENT
      **Generate Content:** Generates a response from the model based on the provided input and context.
      GENERATE_MESSAGE
      **Generate Message:** Generates a message in a conversational context, suitable for chatbot applications and dialogue systems.
      GENERATE_TEXT
      **Generate Text:** Generates text based on a given prompt or context, typically used for creative writing, summarization, or translation tasks.

      static SupportedGenerationMethod fromValue​(String value)
      Returns the `SupportedGenerationMethod` enum value corresponding to the given string representation.
      String getValue()
      Returns the string representation of the generation method.
      static SupportedGenerationMethod valueOf​(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static SupportedGenerationMethod[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • GENERATE_CONTENT

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod GENERATE_CONTENT
        **Generate Content:** Generates a response from the model based on the provided input and context. This is a core functionality of most Gemini models.

      • COUNT_TOKENS

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod COUNT_TOKENS
        **Count Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given text or content, providing insights into the length and complexity of the input.

      • GENERATE_MESSAGE

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod GENERATE_MESSAGE
        **Generate Message:** Generates a message in a conversational context, suitable for chatbot applications and dialogue systems.

      • COUNT_MESSAGE_TOKENS

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod COUNT_MESSAGE_TOKENS
        **Count Message Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given message, specifically designed for analyzing conversational text.

      • GENERATE_TEXT

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod GENERATE_TEXT
        **Generate Text:** Generates text based on a given prompt or context, typically used for creative writing, summarization, or translation tasks.

      • COUNT_TEXT_TOKENS

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod COUNT_TEXT_TOKENS
        **Count Text Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given text, commonly used for text processing and analysis.

      • CREATE_TUNED_TEXT_MODEL

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod CREATE_TUNED_TEXT_MODEL
        **Create Tuned Text Model:** Creates a custom-tuned text model based on a specific dataset and task, allowing for more specialized and accurate text generation.

      • EMBED_TEXT

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod EMBED_TEXT
        **Embed Text:** Embeds text into a vector representation, capturing its semantic meaning and enabling similarity comparisons and other vector-based operations.

      • CREATE_TUNED_MODEL

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod CREATE_TUNED_MODEL
        **Create Tuned Model:** Creates a custom-tuned model for a specific task, going beyond text generation to encompass various model capabilities.

      • CREATE_CACHED_CONTENT

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod CREATE_CACHED_CONTENT
        **Create Cached Content:** Creates and stores cached content for a model, optimizing performance and reducing latency for frequently used inputs or responses.

      • EMBED_CONTENT

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod EMBED_CONTENT
        **Embed Content:** Embeds content, which may include text, images, or other modalities, into a vector representation, facilitating multimodal understanding and processing.

      • GENERATE_ANSWER

        public static final SupportedGenerationMethod GENERATE_ANSWER
        **Generate Answer:** Generates a grounded answer to a question, leveraging external knowledge sources or provided context to provide more informative and accurate responses.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static SupportedGenerationMethod[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (SupportedGenerationMethod c : SupportedGenerationMethod.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static SupportedGenerationMethod valueOf​(String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • fromValue

        public static SupportedGenerationMethod fromValue​(String value)
        Returns the `SupportedGenerationMethod` enum value corresponding to the given string representation.
        Parameters:
        value - The string representation of the generation method.
        Returns:
        The corresponding `SupportedGenerationMethod` enum value, or `null` if no matching value is found.

      • getValue

        public String getValue()
        Returns the string representation of the generation method.
        Returns:
        The string representation of the generation method.
